name: Reclaim.ai
description: Reclaim.ai — AI calendar optimization tool that auto-schedules tasks, habits, and meetings around existing commitments.

seo.title: Reclaim.ai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Reclaim.ai: Reclaim.ai — AI calendar optimization tool that auto-schedules tasks, habits, and meetings around existing commitments.

when_to_use: Auto-scheduling deep work blocks around meetings in Google Cal
Protecting focus time for coding by AI-managed calendar blocking
Syncing habits and task scheduling with calendar availability
Reducing scheduling overhead for developer teams with AI calendar

pros: Protects deep-work and habit time blocks
cons: Google Workspace only, no Outlook parity
Free tier limits many useful features
review.verdict: Useful calendar assistant for Google-centric solo workers; Outlook shops and calendar minimalists will skip it.
review.best_for: Google Workspace professionals managing busy, mixed calendars
review.not_for: Outlook users or people with already light calendar loads

lock_in.reason: Calendar AI, data in Google Cal
